failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch invocation: it omitted required item_id and passed product_id as integer 0 instead of the provided string "1968349452".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was clear: retrieve the price of item 2177997696 using ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id. At index 2, the agent had all required information from the Coordinator's plan query: item_id "2177997696" and product_id "1968349452". Instead, it invoked the tool with only {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using the wrong type/value for product_id. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3. The error was not resolved later; the agent simply produced a failure answer.
